title: hansteinia gracilis
intro: Hansteinia gracilis, also known as Indian gentian, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and xanthones, which have been found to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential antiviral properties. Hansteinia gracilis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine as a decoction to leverage its medicinal properties.
